translation: However, on the contrary, if the person subject to enforcement had already donated his or her property to others before signing the contract, and the creditor, after examining the commercial reputation of the other party (i.e., the person subject to enforcement), still decided to engage in the business transaction at the time of entering into the debt contract, this constitutes a failure by the creditor to fulfill the duty of prudent attention, and the creditor shall bear the transaction risk on its own and may not revoke the donation made by the person subject to enforcement.
